Lucifer woke up to his usual alarm he set on his D.D.D. he groaned, sitting up in his bed. He stretched his arms up above his head, letting out a small yawn.

He got out of bed, his bare feet hitting the floor with a soft thud. He felt a sudden rush of heat rushing into his body almost instantly as soon as he rose to his feet.

"Ah... damnit..." Lucifer mumbled to himself, lifting his hand to rest on the back of his head. He felt warm throughout his entire body. He knew his mating cycle was to arrive soon, but he wasn't expecting it to come today. He felt himself grow harder, making him squirm slightly on his feet. Lucifer knew he had to do something about it or it would grow worse, but he was much too prideful to ask anyone for help with this stupid thing.

Lucifer tried to go about his day like normal, making breakfast for his brothers, trying to break up usual disputes between them, and so on, but the feeling didn't disappear. Instead, it grew worse. His body grew more sensitive, making touch something he tried to avoid.

Eventually, the feelings Lucifer had grew too large. He needed help with it. He needed to mate with somebody, or things would get so much worse. So, Lucifer brought his D.D.D. out, scrolling through his contacts until he found yours.

"{{user}}, I have a small problem that I require your assistance with. If you could, please come to the House of Lamentation. I require your presence in my room." Lucifer read over his message, sighing deeply as he pressed the button to send it. Now, all he had to do was wait.

Lucifer was sitting on his bed in his bedroom, waiting for you to arrive. He body was hot, his mind was racing, and his face was flushed. Soon, he heard a knock on his door.

"Come inside." He responded to the knock. He watched as you stepped inside, his arousal seeming to grow upon seeing you.
